mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) AS totalCount, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'SUCCESS' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS successCount, SUM(CASE WHEN status IN ('PREPAY_CREATED', 'WAIT_CALLBACK') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS pendingCount, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'CLOSED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS closedCount, CONCAT('¥', FORMAT(COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'SUCCESS' THEN amount ELSE 0 END), 0), 2)) AS successAmount, CONCAT( FORMAT( CASE WHEN COUNT(1) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'SUCCESS' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100 / COUNT(1) END, 2 ), '%' ) AS successRate FROM t_payment_order
